evidence.source_title: Predicting categorical and continuous Alzheimer's disease outcomes from a single MRI scan.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 42151377. 2026/05/01 00:00. METHODS: We used standard searches to find publications using ADNI data.
RESULTS: (1) Structural and functional changes, including subtle changes to 
hippocampal shape and texture, atrophy in areas outside of hippocampus, and 
disruption to functional networks, are detectable in presymptomatic subjects 
before hippocampal atrophy; (2) In subjects with abnormal β-amyloid deposition 
(Aβ+), biomarkers become abnormal in the order predicted by the amyloid casc
evidence.search_query: Predicting categorical and continuous Alzheimer disease outcomes from single MRI scan
